moments.title: Love Island 2026 Final
moments.blurb: The grand finale of Love Island 2026 is set to air on Monday, July 27th, crowning the winning couple after eight weeks of villa drama.

angles.name: Final Countdown
angles.copy: Who's taking home the £50k? The Love Island 2026 final is just days away – get ready for the last dose of villa drama!

angles.name: Recap & Predict
angles.copy: After eight weeks, it all comes down to Monday. Who are your top picks for the Love Island crown and why? Tell us now!

moments.title: UK Summer Stays Hot
moments.blurb: The UK is experiencing a significantly warmer than average July, with high pressure bringing dry conditions and temperatures potentially reaching the low 30s Celsius in the South next week.

angles.name: Heatwave Vibes
angles.copy: Sun's out, temps are up! Another week of glorious summer ahead for much of the UK. How are you staying cool in the heat?

angles.name: School's Out Fun
angles.copy: School holidays are in full swing and the sunshine is here to stay! What are your essential summer activities?

moments.title: Carlos Santana turns 79
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana, known for his distinctive blend of rock, Latin, and jazz, celebrates his 79th birthday tomorrow, July 20th.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the incredible Carlos Santana celebrates his 79th! Which Santana track gets you grooving every single time?

angles.name: Woodstock Icon
angles.copy: From Woodstock to 'Smooth', Carlos Santana's sound is unmistakable. Happy 79th to a true guitar icon!

moments.title: Paul Cook (Sex Pistols) turns 70
moments.blurb: Paul Cook, the influential drummer for punk pioneers the Sex Pistols, turns 70 on July 20th.

angles.name: Punk Drummer
angles.copy: Happy 70th to Sex Pistols legend Paul Cook! The beat behind some of the most iconic punk tracks ever made. What's your favourite Sex Pistols anthem?

angles.name: Anarchy in the UK
angles.copy: Tomorrow marks Paul Cook's 70th birthday. The Sex Pistols drummer defined a generation. What a legacy!

moments.title: Cat Stevens (Yusuf Islam) turns 78
moments.blurb: Iconic British singer-songwriter Cat Stevens, also known as Yusuf Islam, celebrates his 78th birthday on July 21st.

angles.name: Folk Icon
angles.copy: From 'Father and Son' to 'Wild World', the timeless music of Cat Stevens resonates across generations. Happy 78th for Tuesday!

angles.name: Yusuf Islam
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 78th birthday to the legendary Yusuf Islam, formerly Cat Stevens, on July 21st. What's your favourite song?

moments.title: Selena Gomez turns 34
moments.blurb: Actress and global pop superstar Selena Gomez celebrates her 34th birthday on July 22nd.

angles.name: Pop Princess
angles.copy: She's been a pop sensation for years! Selena Gomez turns 34 on Wednesday. What's your go-to Selena track?

angles.name: Happy Birthday Selena
angles.copy: Wishing a fabulous 34th birthday to the one and only Selena Gomez this Wednesday! Let's celebrate with her biggest hits.

moments.title: Don Henley (Eagles) turns 79
moments.blurb: Don Henley, co-founder, drummer, and vocalist of the iconic band The Eagles, celebrates his 79th birthday on July 22nd.

angles.name: Eagles Drummer
angles.copy: He's the voice behind some of The Eagles' greatest hits. Don Henley turns 79 on Wednesday! What's your favourite Eagles song?

angles.name: Hotel California Star
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to rock legend Don Henley! His songwriting shaped a generation. What's a classic Don Henley lyric for you?

moments.title: Slash (Guns N' Roses) turns 61
moments.blurb: The instantly recognisable top-hatted guitarist of Guns N' Roses, Slash, celebrates his 61st birthday on July 23rd.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Rock 'n' roll icon Slash turns 61 on Thursday! That guitar riff from 'Sweet Child o' Mine' is still pure magic. What's your favourite Slash moment?

angles.name: Guns N' Roses Legend
angles.copy: Happy 61st to the one and only Slash! The Guns N' Roses guitarist still shreds harder than anyone. What's your ultimate GNR track?

moments.title: Jennifer Lopez turns 57
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez, known for her chart-topping music, acting career, and incredible dance moves, celebrates her 57th birthday on July 24th.

angles.name: J.Lo's Birthday
angles.copy: Still Jenny from the Block! Jennifer Lopez turns 57 this Friday. What's your favourite J.Lo anthem to dance to?

angles.name: Triple Threat
angles.copy: Happy 57th birthday to the one and only J.Lo on Friday! Singer, dancer, actress – she truly does it all.

moments.title: Mick Jagger (Rolling Stones) turns 83
moments.blurb: Sir Mick Jagger, the legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, celebrates his 83rd birthday on July 26th.

angles.name: Still Got The Moves
angles.copy: Can you believe Mick Jagger turns 83 this Sunday?! The energy, the moves, the voice – a true rock god. What's your favourite Stones track?

angles.name: Rock & Roll Royalty
angles.copy: Happy 83rd birthday to the iconic Sir Mick Jagger on July 26th! The man who's been satisfying generations of music fans.

moments.title: Roger Taylor (Queen) turns 77
moments.blurb: Roger Taylor, the powerhouse drummer for rock legends Queen, celebrates his 77th birthday on July 26th.

angles.name: Queen Drummer
angles.copy: The beat behind 'Bohemian Rhapsody' and 'We Will Rock You'! Happy 77th birthday to Queen's Roger Taylor this Sunday!

angles.name: Legendary Percussion
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 77th to Queen's incredibly talented drummer, Roger Taylor, on July 26th! What's your favourite Queen album?

moments.title: Darlene Love turns 85
moments.blurb: The legendary singer Darlene Love, known for her powerful vocals and Christmas classic 'Christmas (Baby Please Come Home)', celebrates her 85th birthday on July 26th.

angles.name: Vocal Powerhouse
angles.copy: Happy 85th birthday to the incredible Darlene Love this Sunday! Her voice is pure magic, especially on those classic tracks.

angles.name: Wall of Sound Star
angles.copy: Celebrating the amazing Darlene Love, who turns 85 on July 26th. A true icon of pop and soul!

moments.title: Geddy Lee (Rush) turns 73
moments.blurb: Geddy Lee, the distinctive vocalist and bassist for progressive rock legends Rush, celebrates his 73rd birthday on July 29th.

angles.name: Rush Frontman
angles.copy: The voice and bass of Rush! Geddy Lee turns 73 this Wednesday. What's your favourite Rush epic?

angles.name: Prog Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 73rd birthday to the one and only Geddy Lee on July 29th! A true master of progressive rock.

moments.title: Wanya Morris (Boyz II Men) turns 53
moments.blurb: Wanya Morris, one of the smooth vocalists from the legendary R&B group Boyz II Men, celebrates his 53rd birthday on July 29th.

angles.name: Boyz II Men Voice
angles.copy: Happy 53rd birthday to Wanya Morris of Boyz II Men this Wednesday! Those harmonies are still iconic. What's your favourite track?

angles.name: R&B Smoothness
angles.copy: Celebrating Wanya Morris from Boyz II Men, who turns 53 on July 29th. Still making hearts melt with that incredible voice.
